tasks.label: set-origin
tasks.command: if (git remote get-url origin) { git remote set-url origin https://github.com/Vignesh-GMAXX/HackRush26-Emulator } else { git remote add origin https://github.com/Vignesh-GMAXX/HackRush26-Emulator }

tasks.label: verify-push-state
tasks.command: git status --short --branch; git remote -v; git log --oneline -1

tasks.label: commit-clean-tasks-final
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json; git commit --message 'Clean Part 1 task configuration for push'
